mano_cua.result_summary: 签名画板点击绘制正常。5轮测试(左上/中央/右下/左下/同位置连续3次)均只产生一个清晰单点,无双点无多余标记。Clear按钮正常。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: 5 rounds of click tests at different positions all produced exactly one clean dot per click. No double-dot or extra marks. Consecutive 3 clicks at same position also showed only one dot. Clear button works correctly.
